---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, scripts, templates, or release package
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What founder workflow or repository problem is not covered well enough today?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the change you want.

## Expected Output

What new artifact, workflow, or repository behavior should exist after the change?

## Why It Matters

Explain the impact for solo founders or maintainers.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or comparable tools.
